Rainmaker Certification
Week 2 - Get Money Now - Level 2
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 8 --

This Week
● Loss Leader Process
● One To Many Process
● Getting Appointments for Phone Sales
● Phone Call Funnel
● E-Commerce Process
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 8 --

Quick Clarifying Definitions
● Loss Leader - Product that is meant to get customers at a low cost, often priced such that you
are unlikely to profit off of it
● Order Bump - Additional Purchase offered at the time of purchase (typically ON the order
form)
● Upsell/OTO - An additional offer made AFTER the purchase has been made
● Front End - What happens during the process being mentioned (typically ads > core funnel)
● Back End - Everything that happens AFTER the process - email follow up, additional offers,
etc
www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 8 --

Loss Leader Process
● ‘Buying Clients’
● The plan is to lose money (although making money is possible and desired) on the
‘front end’ to increase volume, then make the profit on the ‘back end’
● Very important to have good access to the ENTIRE process so you can make data
driven decisions
● Ad Spend, visitors, opt ins, purchases, AOV, LTV are the KPI’s to be looking at
● Increasing the performance of any of these things should be your priority
www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 8 --

One To Many Process
● ‘Buying Viewers’
● Typically very scalable
● Key is to focus efforts on those who are most likely to be receptive to an offer
● Typically the more presentations you can make, the better this will perform
● Ad Spend/Email , Registration Rate, Show Up Rate, Saw-Pitch Rate, Liquidator
Conversion rate, Sales Rate are your key KPI’s here
www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 8 --

Phone Call Process
● Opt In - Some sort of Content / Content Sequence
● Go Apply + Propaganda
● 9 Word
● Go Apply (Different Angle)
● Go Schedule
● Pre Call
● Outbound to non Schedulers
www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 8 --

E Commerce Process
● Key objective is to get money on the initial conversion
● Scaling ads properly will be a HUGE deal here
● There are almost always gaps in this process that lead to lost money
● Abandon cart can account for a large chunk of revenue
● CTR, Sales Page Conversion, Step One, Step Two, Order Bump, OTO, Abandon
Cart
www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 8 --

Facts vs. Feelings
● Rational Thought is going to be your best ‘mindset’
● The more you have to guess what will work based on your thoughts and
feelings, the LESS likely you are to be right
● Decisions that are not based on data are MUCH more likely to be WRONG
www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 8 --
